problems_encountered.description: 403 Forbidden error when attempting to revoke invite. User has Member role on organization but may require Owner role to revoke invitations.

tool_response_summary: Tool execution failed with 403 Forbidden. API returned permission denied for DELETE v2/customer-invites/{inviteId}
execution_notes: Tool executed in 103ms but returned 403 error. The current user (Member role) cannot revoke invitations on this organization. Invite revocation likely requires Owner role. Tool properly handles confirmation parameter but is blocked by API permissions.
